title: Ü Rome's Northern Frontiers. The limes as Cultural Crossroads
further_info: Recommended Reading A.K. Bowman, Life and Letters on the Roman Frontier. Vindolanda and its People (London 1994) D. J. Breeze, Frontiers of the Roman Empire. Hadrian’s Wall (Oxford 2023) D.J. Breeze and P. Guest, Frontiers of the Roman Empire. The Roman Frontiers in Wales (Oxford 2022) D.J. Breeze et al., Frontiers of the Roman Empire. The Upper Germanic Limes (Oxford 2022) D.J. Breeze et al., Frontiers of the Roman Empire. The Lower German Limes (Oxford 2022) R. Collins and F. McIntosh (eds), Life in the Limes. Studies of the People and Objects of the Roman Frontiers Presented to Lindsay Allason-Jones on the Occasion of Her Birthday and Retirement (Oxford 2014) Th. Fischer, Der römische Limes in Bayern. Geschichte und Schauplätze entlang des UNESCO-Welterbes 2(Regensburg 2017) S. Gonzáles Sánchez and A. Guglielmi (eds), Romans and Barbarians Beyond the Frontiers. Archaeology, Ideology and Identities in the North (Oxford 2017) M. Klee, Grenzen des Imperiums. Leben am römischen Limes (Darmstadt 2006) M. Klee, Der römische Limes in Hessen. Geschichte und Schauplätze des UNESCO-Welterbes (Regensburg 2009) W. Moschek, Der römische Limes. Eine Kultur- und Mentalitätsgeschichte (Speyer 2011) E. Schallmayer, Der Limes. Geschichte einer Grenze 4(München 2023)
